feedItems.description: allocated £4.2m to Environment & Streets (≈£46 per resident)
allocated £2.5m to Culture & Leisure (≈£27 per resident)
allocated £7.1m to Council Running Costs (≈£78 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £117 (4.8%) to £2554
